name_en: Premium quality, mini B-clasp messenger bag. Crafted from calfskin in an Italian atelier. Features an unlined design with a soft, structured shape. Named for the B-clasp on the front pocket, which bears the brand's logo. Equipped with an adjustable mesh shoulder strap decorated with fine knit Burberry check, and a discreet Equestrian Knight Emblem (EKD) embossed on the rear panel. The outer pocket features a B-clasp closure; includes an inner slip pocket. Dimensions 19 x 9 x 17.5cm
